programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: Part one of two. The team comes to the aid of a party of holidaymakers on an Austrian mountain, who are unaware they are being held hostage(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: Miraculous claims are made about an ancient skeleton in Mexico, so Quincy and Sam are sent to study it, but are disturbed by a tabloid journalist's take on the story(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Theo is falsely accused by bribery by a criminal he has been trying to bring to justice, and has to contend with an ambitious district attorney out to make a name for himself(n)

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Captain Jack Crocker, a robust seafaring man, is implicated in the murder of beautiful aristocrat Lady Brackenstall's abusive husband. Drama, guest starring Oliver Tobias, with Jeremy Brett, Edward Hardwicke and Anne Louise Lambert(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur and Ray's dreams of riches Down Under fall apart. Left penniless, Ray is forced to bar work while Arthur encounters roguish street trader Derek Collins. George Cole and Gary Webster star(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: CI5 is assigned to protect an Middle Eastern diplomat who is being pursued by assassins. Bodie and Doyle find themselves relentlessly pursued by a gang of assailants that seems able to accurately anticipate their every move, leading to a tense car chase and a riverside shoot-out. Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins star(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan and Carter track down those responsible for killing a driver and injuring a policeman while making off with vehicles carrying brandy on two separate occasions. Carter's new girlfriend, rookie cop Julie Kingdom, pursues a known fence and recovers the brandy. However, when Regan wants to take the credit, he and Carter come to blows. John Thaw and Dennis Waterman star(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: The crime-busting coroner helps defend a college sports coach accused of indirectly causing the death of a potential Olympic champion(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Theo is convinced that a hit-and-run incident which killed a police chemist was deliberately planned, and discovers that an imprisoned corrupt cop and his son are plotting revenge(n)

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A woman asks Holmes to search for her missing husband, a businessman who was last seen peering from the window of an opium den in London's notorious Limehouse area. Suspicion falls on a well-known local beggar - but his innocence is eventually proved in bizarre fashion. Period drama, starring Jeremy Brett(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur pawns his wife's jewellery to solve a temporary cash-flow problem _ but soon finds himself in deeper trouble than ever. Vintage comedy drama, starring George Cole as shady London entrepreneur Arthur Daley(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie's former girlfriend visits from East Germany and he finds himself framed for carrying out an assassination attempt - leaving Doyle with no choice but to bring him in for questioning. Drama, starring Lewis Collins and Martin Shaw(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A member of a group of convicts slips off the roof and dies during a robbery. The apparent leader of the gang appears to be having doubts about his life and Regan senses he is deliberately pointing clues in a desire to be caught during his next job. John Thaw and Dennis Waterman star(n)

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as impressionist Rory Bremner, weather reporter Laura Tobin, Dragons' Den's Deborah Meaden and TV gardener and chat show host Alan Titchmarsh pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught(n)

programme.title: Rescue - River Deep, Mountain High
programme.desc: A walker on Croagh Patrick Mountain sustains a serious head injury and members of the Mayo Mountain Rescue Team carry him down the mountainside to the Irish Coast Guard helicopter. Cairngorm Mountain Rescue Team are called to a climber who has fallen several feet on a rocky outcrop known as Lurchers Crag, while a world-class surfer at Mullaghmore sustains a severe leg injury(n)

programme.title: Rescue - River Deep, Mountain High
programme.desc: In the north of England severe flooding, the worst in 70 years, brings chaos to the region. Standard emergency services are overwhelmed, and numerous volunteer rescue teams are brought in to assist in evacuating members of the public from their flooded homes. In Co Kerry, the local mountain rescue team is called to Torc Mountain and a steep path known as 'cardiac steps' to attend a walker complaining of chest pains. In the Cairngorm mountains, members of the local rescue team comb the third region to find a lost walker who has not returned home after heading out on a trek(n)

programme.title: Fighter Pilot: The Real Top Gun
programme.desc: The three students face the final aerial combat and mission tests to decide if they are ready to take to the skies in the new F35 Lightning fighter jet. The squadron they hope to join returns to Britain from training in South Carolina, and junior pilot Liam must master one of the most difficult manoeuvres he will ever have to face - mid air refuelling(n)

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day (1991)
programme.desc: A reprogrammed killing machine is sent back in time to the 20th century to protect John Connor, a teenage boy whose destiny is to save the human race. After breaking John's mother out of a mental institution, the pair set out to avert a future nuclear war - pursued by an advanced prototype terminator with shape-changing powers. Sci-fi action adventure sequel, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Linda Hamilton, Edward Furlong and Robert Patrick(n)

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A woman asks Holmes to search for her missing husband, a businessman who was last seen peering from the window of an opium den in London's notorious Limehouse area. Suspicion falls on a well-known local beggar - but his innocence is eventually proved in bizarre fashion. Period drama, starring Jeremy Brett(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur pawns his wife's jewellery to solve a temporary cash-flow problem _ but soon finds himself in deeper trouble than ever. Vintage comedy drama, starring George Cole as shady London entrepreneur Arthur Daley(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie's former girlfriend visits from East Germany and he finds himself framed for carrying out an assassination attempt - leaving Doyle with no choice but to bring him in for questioning. Drama, starring Lewis Collins and Martin Shaw(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A member of a group of convicts slips off the roof and dies during a robbery. The apparent leader of the gang appears to be having doubts about his life and Regan senses he is deliberately pointing clues in a desire to be caught during his next job. John Thaw and Dennis Waterman star(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: Quincy stumbles upon a plot devised by a group of Nazi war criminals to use an Egyptian mummy to smuggle rare gems from Cairo to Los Angeles(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Excavations at a demolition site uncover a human skeleton encased in concrete, which leads to the reopening on an unsolved murder case from 18 years previously(n)

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: An intruder begins breaking into people's homes and destroying their plaster statuettes of Napoleon, but leaving more valuable items untouched. Holmes resolves to find out why, eventually uncovering a twisted tale of theft and murder. Jeremy Brett stars as the master detective(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur, Ray and Dave go on a day-trip to Calais, intending to stock the Winchester's cellars with duty-free plonk, but soon find themselves in trouble. Vintage comedy drama, starring George Cole and Gary Webster(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle investigate the death of a burglar who was killed after seeing classified information about a foreign country, and resort to theft in a bid to uncover the embassy's sinister secrets. Liz Fraser and Michael Elphick guest star(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A bad dream has Regan's girlfriend fearing for his safety, and her visions ring true when he gets involved in a case involving a stolen lorryload of cigars. The plot thickens when illicit cocaine is retrieved and arms stolen from the US are discovered to be on their way to a military faction in Ireland. John Thaw and Dennis Waterman star(n)

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as Embarrassing Bodies presenter Dr Christian Jessen, Jonathan Benjamin 'JB' Gill of JLS, comedienne Helen Lederer and former professional snooker player Stephen Hendry pit their wits against the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds for their charity of choice. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught(n)

programme.title: World Rally Championship Highlights
programme.desc: The Monte Carlo Rally. Action from the opening round of the campaign from Monaco, as Estonia's Ott Tanak got his defence of the title under way(n)

programme.title: Van Helsing (2004)
programme.desc: A vampire slayer heads for Transylvania to help a gypsy princess destroy evil bloodsucker Count Dracula and bring his reign of terror to an end. But he must first do battle with a werewolf, Frankenstein's monster and the count's trio of sharp-toothed brides. Gothic action adventure, starring Hugh Jackman, Kate Beckinsale, Richard Roxburgh and David Wenham(n)

programme.title: Blade (1998)
programme.desc: A half-vampire possesses all the strengths inherent in bloodsuckers with none of their weaknesses, and is determined to wipe the monsters from the face of the Earth. However, he faces a deadly new threat in a renegade vampire who is close to decoding an ancient prophecy that will allow him to repopulate the world with his kind. Action thriller, starring Wesley Snipes, Stephen Dorff and Kris Kristofferson(n)

Clayne Crawford, Damon Wayans and Dante Brown star(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: The coroner is hired as technical adviser on a movie inspired by a famous homicide case, and becomes convinced the real murderer is still at large(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: A gang of art thieves is arrested, but the priceless drawings they stole are still missing. Theo is forced to work with a world famous criminologist to recover the missing artwork(n)

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Suffering from nervous exhaustion, Holmes sets off for a break on the wild Cornish peninsula, where he hopes the peace and quiet will help him convalesce. Unfortunately, several murders ensure his holiday is far from relaxing. Period detective drama, guest starring Denis Quilley(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur attempts to protect his friend Sidney, who on mistakenly being diagnosed with a fatal illness, arranged for a hitman to kill him so his wife would benefit from his life insurance. While Ray attempts to counter the deal, the best safe house the dodgy dealer can provide is a leaky caravan in Brighton, the property of Dave's sister. Andrew Sachs guest stars, with George Cole and Gary Webster(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: The resources of CI5 are stretched when a mentally unbalanced former soldier starts killing hospital staff, believing them responsible for the death of his wife and for the brain damage suffered by his young daughter. Drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A former criminal and friend of Regan's wins a large amount of money on the pools - but then receives blackmailing phone calls regarding a crime from 11 years earlier for which he was never caught. Hard-hitting drama, guest starring Edward Judd, with John Thaw and Dennis Waterman(n)

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Heptathlete Louise Hazel, comedian Joel Dommett, 1980s music star Sinitta and actor Les Dennis team up to take part in the quiz show, in which they must answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit - all without being caught out by the 'quiz genius' Chaser. Presented by Bradley Walsh(n)

programme.title: Junk and Disorderly
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Sam Lovegrove try to break into the classic tractor market, as they continue their quest to make money out of buying and selling people's unwanted automotive junk(n)

programme.title: Billy Connolly's Great American Trail
programme.desc: Billy's final leg begins in Virginia on the trail of bootleggers dealing in moonshine before he hears the story of the amazing woman who led hundreds of slaves to their freedom. He stops off at a farm where he encounters bizarre heads of all the US presidents, learns about the opioid crisis - the biggest epidemic in American history - and visits the backroom of flamboyant designer Manuel Cuuevas, who was responsible for dressing rock stars including Elvis, Cher and the Beatles. The comedian's tour finally ends in Nashville at the home of country music, the Grand Ole Opry(n)

programme.title: Waterworld (1995)
programme.desc: In the future, environmental disasters have left the planet flooded. A web-footed mutant mariner helps a woman and an orphan girl search for a mythical haven of dry land, with the help of a map tattooed on the child's back - but in the process has to fend off a villainous crew of nicotine-addicted pirates. Sci-fi adventure, starring Kevin Costner, Dennis Hopper, Jeanne Tripplehorn, Tina Majorino and Rick Aviles(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: Miraculous claims are made about an ancient skeleton in Mexico, so Quincy and Sam are sent to study it, but are disturbed by a tabloid journalist's take on the story(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Theo is falsely accused by bribery by a criminal he has been trying to bring to justice, and has to contend with an ambitious district attorney out to make a name for himself(n)

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Captain Jack Crocker, a robust seafaring man, is implicated in the murder of beautiful aristocrat Lady Brackenstall's abusive husband. Drama, guest starring Oliver Tobias, with Jeremy Brett, Edward Hardwicke and Anne Louise Lambert(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur and Ray's dreams of riches Down Under fall apart. Left penniless, Ray is forced to bar work while Arthur encounters roguish street trader Derek Collins. George Cole and Gary Webster star(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: CI5 is assigned to protect an Middle Eastern diplomat who is being pursued by assassins. Bodie and Doyle find themselves relentlessly pursued by a gang of assailants that seems able to accurately anticipate their every move, leading to a tense car chase and a riverside shoot-out. Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins star(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan and Carter track down those responsible for killing a driver and injuring a policeman while making off with vehicles carrying brandy on two separate occasions. Carter's new girlfriend, rookie cop Julie Kingdom, pursues a known fence and recovers the brandy. However, when Regan wants to take the credit, he and Carter come to blows. John Thaw and Dennis Waterman star(n)

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as impressionist Rory Bremner, weather reporter Laura Tobin, Dragons' Den's Deborah Meaden and TV gardener and chat show host Alan Titchmarsh pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught(n)

programme.title: Rescue - River Deep, Mountain High
programme.desc: A walker on Croagh Patrick Mountain sustains a serious head injury and members of the Mayo Mountain Rescue Team carry him down the mountainside to the Irish Coast Guard helicopter. Cairngorm Mountain Rescue Team are called to a climber who has fallen several feet on a rocky outcrop known as Lurchers Crag, while a world-class surfer at Mullaghmore sustains a severe leg injury(n)

programme.title: Rescue - River Deep, Mountain High
programme.desc: In the north of England severe flooding, the worst in 70 years, brings chaos to the region. Standard emergency services are overwhelmed, and numerous volunteer rescue teams are brought in to assist in evacuating members of the public from their flooded homes. In Co Kerry, the local mountain rescue team is called to Torc Mountain and a steep path known as 'cardiac steps' to attend a walker complaining of chest pains. In the Cairngorm mountains, members of the local rescue team comb the third region to find a lost walker who has not returned home after heading out on a trek(n)

programme.title: Fighter Pilot: The Real Top Gun
programme.desc: The three students face the final aerial combat and mission tests to decide if they are ready to take to the skies in the new F35 Lightning fighter jet. The squadron they hope to join returns to Britain from training in South Carolina, and junior pilot Liam must master one of the most difficult manoeuvres he will ever have to face - mid air refuelling(n)

Sci-fi action adventure sequel, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Linda Hamilton, Edward Furlong and Robert Patrick(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A look at the night shift in a busy A&E department. A woman with a severe form of autism is brought in, having suffered an injury to one of her fingers. While she is treated, her sister shares stories of their childhood and the challenges their family have faced. An 82-year-old patient has difficulty breathing, and doctors suspect he has developed life-threatening sepsis and need to act fast to try to halt the spread of infection(n)

programme.title: Losing It: Our Mental Health Emergency
programme.desc: A teenager with a history of bullying is admitted to a psychiatric ward after a pattern of self-harm and suicide attempts that has left her mother forced to remove all sharp objects from the house and keep medicines locked up. A doctor discusses how she has been forced to seek outside help in dealing with her daughter's eating disorder when it began to seriously impact on her health, and child and Adolescent Mental Health nurse Steph Langley discusses why modern teenagers are now more likely to harm themselves in response to low mood(n)

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: This edition focuses on the importance of the father-son relationship and the potential consequences and difficulties when this relationship is not a positive one. Frontline officers talk frankly about their experiences of how the breakdown of this pivotal formative experience can lead to young men perpetuating cycles of violence, lacking confidence, or struggling with mental health problems(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay visits family-run Luigi's in Orange County, California, where lazy shortcuts following the retirement of the owner's father have led the business to suffer. Ramsay faces the daunting task of reuniting a feuding family, before turning around the struggling restaurant, which currently has 126 dishes on the menu(n)

programme.title: Meat the Family
programme.desc: Four families challenge their meat-eating habits by spending three weeks caring for farm animals in their homes. In the final episode, another family meet two male dairy calves that make them question their eating habits, and Jade and Jazmyn find themselves torn after their recent experiences, but will it be enough to stop them eating meat?(n)

programme.title: How to Lose Weight Well
programme.desc: Xand van Tulleken and Helen Lawal oversee proceedings as three more pairs road test some of the most popular and talked about diets. Teaching assistants Sheila and Syrika have a week to trim down ahead of their end-of-term party, partners Greg and Nath go on six-week diets to slim down before Lincoln Pride and Becci and Cassie want to lose weight for a friend's wedding in three months. Xand asks if fizzy water can really make people gain weight and also goes on a keto diet(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Four amateur chefs in east Suffolk compete to win the £1,000 prize. programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet a couple in Rushden in Northamptonshire who are unsure whether they should renovate their current home or sell up and move into another. Susan and John are torn over their unique five-bed character home, so Kirstie and Phil offer their expert advice in an effort to help them make the right decision for their family's future(n)

programme.title: Farage: The Man Who Made Brexit
programme.desc: Filmed over five months, this documentary explores the world of the British politician Nigel Farage as he attempts to build on his historic success in May 2019's European elections. This documentary captures the inside story of Farage's doomed attempt to persuade Boris Johnson to join a Leavers' Alliance with him, and also charts Farage's influence in changing British politics in the wake of the 2016 EU referendum. With racism returning to haunt the party and plummeting poll ratings, is December 2019's general election the event that finally persuades Farage that the UK will never buy what he is selling? Or can he claim victory with a brand-new right-leaning Tory government that supports much of what he stands for?(n)

programme.title: Auschwitz Untold: In Colour
programme.desc: A powerful and revelatory account of one of the most hideous crimes in human history told from the perspectives of 16 extraordinary Holocaust survivors. The survivors retell of the rise of fascism, the uprooting of families, and the long journey from centuries-old Jewish communities into Auschwitz. The film includes a rare and haunting collection of photographs called the 'Auschwitz Album', and chronicles with unflinching detail the survival challenges at Auschwitz-Birkenau, as well as tales of resistance inside the camp, including sabotaging armaments for the Nazi war machine(n)

programme.desc: Documentary profiling youngsters who perform in the big top, offering an honest insight into their closely guarded world. A 17-year-old is sent to the circus as a punishment after getting into trouble with the police, and tries to perfect the knife-throwing act made famous by his father. An eight-year-old makes his debut as a clown alongside his dad, although there's bad news - he may soon have to leave the big top to attend school. programme.title: Secret Scotland
programme.desc: As her journey around her homeland continues, Susan visits the Isle of Skye, where she embarks on an exclusive tour of Dunvegan Castle, which has been home to the McLeods for over 800 years. There, she learns all about clan warfare and discovers a ceremonial horn that has been passed down through generations of clan chiefs since the 14th century. Next, the comedian takes to the seas to operate the world's only turntable ferry, before trying her hand at the accordion. Finally, Susan gains an insight into the workings of a modern-day croft and finds out how to shear a sheep(n)

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Trainer Graeme Hall arrives in Leeds, where English bulldog Wilson's destructive behaviour is making his owner so distraught that she is considering having him rehomed. Realising that this bolshie bulldog's behaviour is all for attention, Graeme sets about turning it around and to restore harmony to the home. Later, in Northampton, Graeme encounters Pomeranians Bella and Lola, who are attacking anything coming through the door(n)

programme.title: Ben Fogle: New Lives in the Wild
programme.desc: As one of the world's most in-demand sporting coaches, 43-year-old Nikola Boric once travelled the world, welcomed everywhere he went. Now, he lives in a wooden cabin without electricity, water or heating, with just some pigs and goats for company. Experiencing Nikola's new life in the woods above the village of Kokocak on the edge of Papuk Nature Park, Ben tries to understand what drove Nikola to make a sudden decision to quit everything and retire to such a forgotten corner of the world, finding a new life of purity and self-sufficiency away from mainstream society(n)

programme.title: Bad Girls Behind Bars
programme.desc: Suspected of being in a romantic relationship, Lo and Kayla are still being kept apart by officers - and Lo has a difficult decision to make. When jail veterans Jackie and Kourtney are moved, they bring with them all the latest news. Detox over, heroin addict Natasha is moved into the jail's general population. Used to living with her mother, how she will cope when thrown into an eight-person tank remains to be seen(n)

programme.title: Extraordinary People
programme.desc: The story of 17-year-old Erick John Rwabirire from Uganda, who was born with a rare bone disorder that has resulted in a tumour on his face so large it is now the same size and weight as his head - and it is getting bigger. The film reveals the daily hardships for Erick, who is unable to eat, drink or breathe normally, and follows him and his family to London's Chelsea & Westminster hospital, where a team of surgeons plan to use ground-breaking surgery to rebuild his face and ultimately save his life(n)

programme.title: Traffic Cops

An elderly Akita named Bear is signed over to the charity when its owner sees she's starting to struggle with the stairs to his flat, and Angellica Bell discovers what rescue dogs are capable of when she's introduced to the team at Medical Detection Dogs, who have been successfully training man's best friend to sniff out diseases such as cancer and malaria(n)

programme.title: Cruising with Jane McDonald
programme.desc: A Lilliputian lope round the Inner Hebrides puts Jane in touch with her Scottish roots, as alongside just six other passengers the singer embarks on what is easily her smallest ever cruise. Jane enjoys unseasonably cloudless skies and sparkling seas as the route takes in the puffin-packed Treshnish Islands and Fingal's Cave on Staffa, the mythic rock formation that famously inspired Mendelssohn's Hebrides Overture. The excursion is rounded off with some traditional trappings, from ceilidhs and weaving to haggis-making(n)

programme.desc: A Venice water courier is tasked with transporting a fragile and valuable glass vase, but his duties are disrupted by a bomb scare. A delivery team is tasked with transporting an entire orchestra's instruments from London's Barbican Theatre to the Paris Philharmonic in time for a concert the following night, while a cargo plane has just 40 minutes to be prepared for take-off(n)

programme.title: Britain's Parking Hell
programme.desc: In the Pembrokeshire town of Tenby, Welsh and English rugby fans seem more focused on kick-off time than parking, threatening to turn its roads into a ruck of cars. Meanwhile in Cardiff, a city with the dubious title of Britain's third-worst place to park, two carloads of parking desperadoes search for a space on match day. In Ivybridge, Devon, locals claim a ticket machine with a typo problem has resulted in an avalanche of unjust tickets and are determined to take their fight to the top(n)

programme.title: Red Arrows Take America
programme.desc: The display team fly over Niagara Falls before arriving in Toronto, where they demonstrate their aerobatic moves alongside their Canadian Air Force counterparts, the Snowbirds. The pilots then meet astronaut Chris Hadfield, who is given the rare opportunity to fly in one of the team's jets. As their tour continues, the pilots perform at the Spirit of St Louis Air Show, before travelling north to Rocky Mountain Airport, where several of the jets suffer deflated tyres in the heat(n)

programme.title: Rich Kids Go Homeless
programme.desc: Rukaya, a youngster who lives in a palatial seven-bedroom house with her parents, agrees to sleep rough on the streets of London for three nights. She soon feels vulnerable on the streets when a group of men intimidate her and a fellow homeless woman. Begging brings only 20p, so the second night is spent in a shelter, where she meets a woman whose alcoholism cost her her family(n)

programme.title: The Sex Business
programme.desc: A disparate group of young sex workers reveal what life is really like trying to make a living as escorts, cammers and sex entrepreneurs. The film explores why these young women decided to 'stop giving it away for free', revealing in the process how materialism has collided with a new age of sexual pragmatism(n)

programme.title: BSL Zone
programme.desc: Join Adam Bassett and his guests in the Boot Room this month to discuss the best of the month's Deaf Football - on and off the pitch(n)

programme.title: Gentlemen Prefer Blondes (1953)
programme.desc: Lounge singers Lorelei and Dorothy embark on a transatlantic cruise to Paris in search of rich husbands. While Dorothy falls for a penniless man, Lorelei thinks she has found the millionaire of her dreams, only for his father to hire a private eye to spy on her and prove she is a gold-digger. Howard Hawks' musical comedy, starring Marilyn Monroe, Jane Russell, Charles Coburn and Elliott Reid(n)

programme.title: The Three Musketeers (1973)
programme.desc: A naive country boy arrives in Paris, keen to seek adventure and prove himself a swordsman. He falls in with a trio of roguish soldiers, and together they set out to save the queen from the schemes of a treacherous cardinal. Swashbuckling adventure, starring Oliver Reed, Michael York, Richard Chamberlain, Frank Finlay, Charlton Heston and Faye Dunaway(n)

programme.title: Waterloo Road (1944)
programme.desc: A soldier serving in the Second World War discovers his wife has betrayed him by having an affair with a petty crook, so he resolves to settle matters and deserts from the army. He returns to a Blitz-ravaged London to confront his rival, but his quest for retribution is interrupted by an air raid. Drama, starring John Mills, Joy Shelton, Alastair Sim and Stewart Granger(n)

programme.title: Run Wild, Run Free (1969)
programme.desc: Withdrawn, mute 10-year-old Philip is ignored by his parents and goes off to explore Dartmoor alone, where he meets a retired colonel who shares his knowledge of Devon's wildlife. Under the older man's nurturing tutelage, the boy begins to tame a wild white colt, but fate proffers a series of setbacks just as real progress is being made. Children's drama, starring John Mills, Mark Lester, Sylvia Syms and Bernard Miles(n)

programme.title: The Devil Wears Prada (2006)
programme.desc: A woman with dreams of becoming a journalist takes a job as assistant to the editor of a prestigious fashion magazine - a position that should guarantee a bright future if she succeeds. Unfortunately, she has just signed up to work for the boss from hell, whose cruel personality and outrageous demands make her life a nightmare. Comedy drama, with Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Stanley Tucci and Emily Blunt(n)

programme.title: The Other Woman (2014)
programme.desc: A woman is devastated to learn her boyfriend is actually married, but when she meets his wife, they quickly become friends. When they discover he has a third secret lover, they decide to join forces and teach him a lesson. Comedy, starring Cameron Diaz, Leslie Mann, Kate Upton and Nikolaj Coster-Waldau(n)

programme.title: Lone Survivor (2013)
programme.desc: Four American soldiers are sent on a mission into the mountains of Afghanistan to track down and eliminate a high-ranking terrorist leader. They soon find themselves faced with a terrible moral dilemma and a battle for survival against overwhelming odds. Fact-based drama, starring Mark Wahlberg, Taylor Kitsch, Emile Hirsch and Ben Foster(n)

programme.title: The Paperboy (2012)
programme.desc: A reporter returns to his home town to investigate the story of a man on death row for the murder of a sheriff. He enlists the help of his younger brother, who falls in love with a woman infatuated with the condemned man and determined to marry him on his release. Drama set in the 1960s, starring Matthew McConaughey, Zac Efron, Nicole Kidman and John Cusack(n)

programme.title: When Eight Bells Toll (1971)
programme.desc: A Navy intelligence agent heads to Scotland, where he poses as a marine biologist to investigate the theft of millions of pounds in gold bullion from ships off the British coast. However, the locals counter his enquiries with hostility, especially when he sets his sights on a Greek tycoon, whom he suspects may be operating as a modern-day pirate. Thriller, with Anthony Hopkins, Robert Morley and Jack Hawkins. Based on a novel by Alistair MacLean(n)

programme.title: Cottage to Let (1941)
programme.desc: A British inventor's revolutionary bombsight is set to have a positive impact on the war effort. However, military intelligence detects the Nazis are aware of the invention, while a plucky teenage cockney evacuated to the boffin's Scottish country estate sets out to expose a German spy ring. Second World War thriller, with Leslie Banks, John Mills, Alastair Sim and George Cole in his screen debut(n)

programme.title: The Man from Laramie (1955)
programme.desc: A cavalry officer determines to avenge the death of his brother, but rather than target the Apaches who killed him, he vows to go after the gang who supplied them with their weapons - leading to conflict with the sadistic son of an elderly rancher. Anthony Mann's Western, starring James Stewart, Arthur Kennedy, Donald Crisp and Cathy O'Donnell(n)

programme.title: Ride Lonesome (1959)
programme.desc: A bounty hunter captures young killer Billy John, but his real motive is not the cash reward - he has an old score to settle with his prisoner's brother Frank. As the journey to bring the murderer to justice gets under way, he is counting on a showdown with Frank and accepts the help of two outlaw gunmen for added protection, aware they will try to turn Billy John in themselves for the reward and a pardon. Western, with Randolph Scott, Lee Van Cleef, James Best, James Coburn and Pernell Roberts.(n)

programme.title: Star Trek Into Darkness (2013)
programme.desc: Captain Kirk and the crew of the starship Enterprise are sent on a clandestine mission into enemy territory to track down the rogue Starfleet agent behind a terrorist attack on Earth. However, the assignment brings to light a hidden threat from within their own organisation. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Chris Pine, Zachary Quinto and Benedict Cumberbatch(n)

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (2014)
programme.desc: A reporter discovers four humanoid amphibians who live in the sewers of New York, and use their martial arts skills to fight crime. She helps them as they face their toughest challenge yet - defeating a sinister criminal organisation that seems to have power over the entire city. Fantasy adventure, starring Megan Fox and William Fichtner, with the voice of Johnny Knoxville(n)

programme.title: Heat (1995)
programme.desc: An armoured car hold-up sets a veteran police detective on the trail of a highly intelligent career criminal, whom he is obsessed with capturing. Meanwhile, the robber is planning an elaborate bank heist as his final job before retiring, and a complex game of cat and mouse develops between the two. Michael Mann's crime thriller, starring Al Pacino, Robert De Niro, Val Kilmer, Jon Voight, Tom Sizemore and Natalie Portman(n)

programme.title: Piranha 3DD (2012)
programme.desc: A marine biologist is appalled at her stepfather's sleazy plans for the waterpark they co-own, but discovers there are bigger problems to worry about after a series of grisly attacks by man-eating fish. She fails to prevent the grand opening from going ahead, and soon the aquatic predators are feasting on the visitors. Comedy horror sequel, starring Danielle Panabaker and Matt Bush(n)

programme.title: The Naked Jungle (1954)
programme.desc: A tough South American cocoa plantation owner and his newly arrived mail-order bride are menaced by a huge column of ferocious killer ants destroying everything in their path. Thriller, starring Charlton Heston, Eleanor Parker and William Conrad(n)

programme.title: Two Thousand Women (1944)
programme.desc: Female prisoners struggle to cope with living in a German internment camp, but find common cause in making life difficult for their captors. When three British airmen are shot down over the prison, they keep them hidden from the Germans while plotting a way to smuggle them out safely. Second World War comedy, with Phyllis Calvert, Flora Robson, Patricia Roc and Renee Houston(n)

Western adapted from a novel by Elmore Leonard, with Van Heflin, Glenn Ford, Felicia Farr and Leora Dana(n)

Second World War thriller, starring Robert Mitchum, Curt Jurgens, Theodore Bikel and David Hedison(n)

Fantasy comedy, starring Ben Stiller, Dick Van Dyke, Robin Williams, Carla Gugino and Ricky Gervais(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon returns to Texas in disgrace when he discovers his friends tampered with the Arctic expedition data after growing tired of his quest for a scientific breakthrough. Elsewhere, Leonard becomes frustrated as constant interruptions hamper his attempts to woo Penny(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Howard stake their most coveted comic books on a bet over the species of a cricket, while Leonard and Penny struggle to recover from an awkward first night together. Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Simon Helberg and Kaley Cuoco star(n)

With her best friend Sharon along to help her with the decision, Danni Menzies shows her five properties on the southern Costa Blanca for her £50,000 budget(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Guy and Julie Sadler from Brighton have travelled all around the world together and have long dreamed of relocating somewhere warm. Now, although they've never been to Spain, they've decided that Almería has the perfect balance of sunshine and affordable property. Laura Hamilton shows them five homes for their £100,000 budget(n)

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The remaining bakers are tested to the limit in pastry week, including an ambitious final challenge that sees them pushed to the edge creating a majestic pie fit for a banquet. Before that, the Signature challenge centres on samosas, with a sweet and a savoury option required, and there is a classic French Technical involving two types of pastry. Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith decide which of the bakers has to leave the competition, with Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig on hand for some emotional support and encouragement(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It

programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien head east to Newark in search of their latest upcycling prospects. Simon finds an antique European threshing board, which he turns into a coffee table, and Henry's all at sea with a ship's porthole(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Claire Hilton, who runs Robertsbrook Guest House in Swanage, Dorset, feels she has a good chance of winning the title of best B&B as another round of the competition gets under way. However, guests Lynn Self and Ziggy Broome have doubts over the cleanliness of their bedroom, and another couple are accustomed to more opulent surroundings(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Lynn Self and Ziggy Broome hope to impress with their two-star B&B Eden Lodge in Falmouth, Cornwall. However, the state of their property disappoints their fellow competitors. At dinner, James and Maria Church reveal the truth about their famous daughter Charlotte, and the following morning's breakfast reduces some of the guests to fits of giggles(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It is the turn of Charlotte Church's parents James and Maria to play host at Dexby Townhouse in Cardiff, and they pull out all the stops by laying on a day of white-water rafting and a magic performance courtesy of their nephew Elliot. But the following morning, some of the guests are kept waiting for breakfast(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Newlyweds Pip Easby and Nicky Lesser-Easby, who run Muddifords Court Country House in Devon, open their doors for the final stay of the competition. The Churches find their four-poster bed too small, and not all the guests enjoy their trip to a local glass-blowing factory, but feedback at check-out time leaves the hosts feeling confident(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers and to air their grievances. An underpayment from a surprising source changes the dynamics of the group and throws the competition wide open, before the winner is announced(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: An elephant calf is born at Chester Zoo, but its young half-sister doesn't welcome the new arrival. Meanwhile, Bush dog dad Franco is under pressure as its family grows, and an onager - a rare type of wild horse - faces a major operation(n)

programme.title: Love It or List It Australia
programme.desc: Andrew Winter and Neale Whitaker help a Brisbane couple, with Ryan having enough of the constant maintenance required by their property(n)

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Presenter Tim Shaw and master mechanic Fuzz Townshend travel to Lincoln to renovate a Ford Cortina GT. However, when they arrive at the lock-up garage where it is kept, they find the vehicle has seen much better days, and is now little more than a well-preserved body shell with numerous mechanical parts missing(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Angel Adoree insists that Dick Strawbridge smash a hole through one of the castle's three-foot-thick interior walls to create a honeymoon suite, but he has far too much to do on his own and the schedule slips, badly(n)

programme.title: Auschwitz Untold: In Colour
programme.desc: Part two of two. First-hand accounts from survivors of their fateful arrival at Auschwitz-Birkenau, through to liberation day and its immediate psychological aftermath(n)

programme.title: Holocaust: The Revenge Plot
programme.desc: Documentary, making use of previously undisclosed recordings and candid interviews to tell the story of the Avengers, a secret organisation of Holocaust survivors who came up with a brutal plot in 1946 to seek vengeance on behalf of the six million Jews killed by Hitler and the Nazis. In the dying days of the Second World War, 'warrior-poet' Abba Kovner came to the conclusion that the prosecution of a handful of Nazis would not amount to justice, and instead claimed only 'an eye for an eye' could possibly redress the balance. With the help of a band of like-minded individuals, Kovner planned to murder six million Germans by infiltrating cities and poisoning water supplies. This film also showcases a clandestine recording, made in 1985 at the dying Kovner's request, that identifies all the leading conspirators and how they carried out their operations(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Two families come to terms with life-changing events, including the relatives of eight-year-old Junior, who has an open leg fracture and suspected internal bleeding after being knocked off his bike by a car. His mum Bekki reveals how Junior learned to cope with extraordinary setbacks and how she worries about his future because of health problems of her own. Meanwhile, 46-year-old Anthony arrives in A&E after suffering chest pains during a day out at the races. As doctors attempt to get to the bottom of what's causing his dangerously high heart rate, his wife discusses how Anthony's awareness of his mortality was increased by losing his father(n)

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: The heli-medics race to Linda, who has suffered a heart attack on a Norfolk beach, while motocross rider Alex is in a bad way after he's hit by another bike(n)

programme.title: Auschwitz Untold: In Colour
programme.desc: Part two of two. First-hand accounts from survivors of their fateful arrival at Auschwitz-Birkenau, through to liberation day and its immediate psychological aftermath(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Two families come to terms with life-changing events, including the relatives of eight-year-old Junior, who has an open leg fracture and suspected internal bleeding after being knocked off his bike by a car. programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty visits Ecuador to investigate claims that bananas could one day be used in the fight against a number of viruses including HIV and influenza. Kate Quilton goes in search of a meat substitute that delivers its promise on the tastebuds, visiting the Netherlands where a product called 'plant meat' has been developed by scientists. Plus, Matt Tebbutt visits one of Britain's largest crisp manufacturers to witness the high-tech machinery used to maintain standards of quality(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Bonnie Motley from Hertfordshire is looking to improve her quality of life, and is convinced buying a holiday home in the guaranteed sunshine of southern Spain is just the way to do that. With friend of 30 years Jonathan along to help her with the decision, Ben Hillman shows Bonnie five properties within her £20,000 budget(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Musical couple Paul and Judith Corazzo from Dorset have been dreaming of buying a holiday home in sunny Spain, where they can escape from their hectic work lives back in the UK. For their budget of £140,000, Jasmine Harman shows them five properties to consider(n)

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: For the very first time on the show, vegan week takes place. Judges Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood have set three very different challenges to test the remaining bakers - a savoury pastry Signature, with no butter involved, a Technical with a very unusual ingredient and a spectacular Showstopper that in the heat of the tent threatens to lead to catastrophe. Who will keep their cool and win star baker? And who will be meeting their end? As ever, Sandi Toksvig and Noel Fielding are on hand to lend support to the contestants(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien turns tank parts into garden furniture, while Henry Cole takes his life in his hands with a motorised skateboard(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien converts a lantern into a stylish table and Henry Cole changes a fire extinguisher into a steampunk lamp as the pair visit a private railway(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Brigitte Tee, who runs four-star B&B Gorse Meadow in the New Forest, hosts the first round of the competition. Her guests are initially charmed by her eccentric personality, but the discovery of a bathroom window in need of repair and another room containing ladybirds, cobwebs and dust soon takes the shine off their stay(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants head to Lynton in north Devon, where they stay at Alistair and Emma Mundell's four-star Castle Hill Guesthouse. The pair only opened the B&B three months prior to the competition, and hope to impress with their recently renovated rooms, but Brigitte Tee proves hard to win over. Two of their guests are also forced to overcome their fears during a trip on a Victorian cliff railway(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition moves north to Blackpool and the three-star Vidella B&B run by John Downer and Neil Williams. The pair rig Blackpool-hater Alistair Mundell's room with practical jokes, and take their guests to Funny Girls drag cabaret bar, where Mark Crib confesses he has never had such a surreal time(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Entrepreneur Mark Crib welcomes the group to the Urban Beach in Bournemouth, Dorset, for the week's final B&B visit. The boutique establishment features chic rooms with deluxe bathrooms, and the guests approve of the afternoon's activity - a speedboat ride along the Jurassic coast(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers and to air their grievances. Brigitte Tee is upset to discover she has been given only one point for cleanliness and a heated exchange results in a walk-out, before the winner is announced(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Elderly one-eyed South African porcupine Roxy is introduced to a new, younger male called Henning, in the hope that she will find companionship in her old age. Kifaru, the oldest eastern black rhino at Chester Zoo, meets younger female Malindi, with the expectation that they will produce offspring to increase the dwindling population, while the Caribbean flamingos are breeding again(n)

programme.title: Love It or List It Australia
programme.desc: Andrew Winter and Neale Whitaker help a couple find a home in Sydney's Paddington area within their budget - or realise the value of their current residence(n)

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Presenter Tim Shaw and master mechanic Fuzz Townshend head to Cheshire to answer an SOS call about a 1938 MG TA, whose owner is unable to restore it due to illness(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree only have a few weeks to prepare for their wedding, but the chateau is nowhere near ready to receive the 200 guests they have invited and finding reliable, affordable workers is proving difficult. Dick oversees the damming of the moat and the installation of a new, eco-friendly sewage system, while Angel turns her attention to giving the rooms a distinctive decor(n)

programme.title: David Jason's Great British Inventions
programme.desc: The actor examines British innovations in the history of flight, from the first glider to the modern jet suit, and discovers how Britain contributed to the moon landing(n)

programme.title: Million Pound Mega Yachts
programme.desc: Documentary about the Monaco Yacht Show, where over 100 of the largest yachts on the water are up for sale, with billionaire buyers competing to own the most extravagant vessels. The programme follows those who make, buy and work on these craft, including a Soho businessman planning to sail around the world, a broker with 25 years experience looking to sell a £130 million yacht, and a billionaire installing a crystal chandelier in his floating palace(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Greg, 47, is airlifted to St George's with critical injuries to his arm and leg after being knocked off his motorbike on the way into work. As his wife Lucie rushes to his bedside, she's shocked by what she finds. Cameras also follow, Cara, 11, who has fallen from the top of a human pyramid doing gymnastics and has a broken arm that doctors must try to realign(n)

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: The trials and tribulations of coming of age in Britain, and the challenges faced in dealing with people in the legal and social hinterland between childhood and adulthood. In Warrington, PC Ruth Stott is called to attend a group of teenagers after 999 calls from intimidated local homeowners, while in Crewe, PCs Bryony Hancock and Charlotte Wilson are called to intervene in a case of alleged online bullying(n)

programme.title: David Jason's Great British Inventions
programme.desc: The actor examines British innovations in the history of flight, from the first glider to the modern jet suit, and discovers how Britain contributed to the moon landing(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Greg, 47, is airlifted to St George's with critical injuries to his arm and leg after being knocked off his motorbike on the way into work. programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Kate Quilton visits California to investigate why almond butter is more expensive than other nutty spreads. Jimmy Doherty heads to Spain and Portugal to find out how wine is turned into fortified wine, and with help from an innovative farmer and a team of cage fighters, Matt Tebbutt learns why slicing onions makes people cry(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Robert Pemberton and Carole Wheatley have recently retired and are looking for a winter home where they can embrace their passion for gardening and spend time with their children and grandchildren. Ben Hillman shows them five properties in the lush north of Tenerife for their £120,000 budget(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman helps a couple with a £250,000 budget who have decided to move full time to northern Costa Blanca, but first they must choose from five possible homes(n)

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: It's Danish Week, and the bakers face unfamiliar recipes as they battle to impress the judges. There's a bread challenge Signature, where they must demonstrate style as well substance. Paul Hollywood sets a spherical Technical - and with a place in the semi-final at stake, everyone is out to impress him and Prue Leith. For their final challenge, the bakers must deliver an elaborate pastry Showstopper fit for a Danish birthday party(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Max McMurdo restores a pair of designer chairs, while Henry Cole breathes new life into a decrepit garden table, transforming it into a colourful and valuable new one(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien turn an old, unloved filing cabinet into a valuable and desirable storage unit and convert a Bakelite voltmeter into a retro Bluetooth speaker(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Jon and Julia Shorrock host the first round of the B&B competition from their four-star Derwent House in West Sussex. The guests are split by gender to sample the area, with the men firing machine guns at a shooting range and the women relaxing at a spa - but a carpeted bathroom and shower without hot water raise questions(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Peter and Sharron Sorsky invite their fellow competitors to Kirkby Park B&B in Liverpool, but the presence of a security camera on the outside of the house leaves one guest feeling uneasy. Room inspections uncover all manner of unsightly problems, but a tour of nearby Knowsley Safari Park gives the contestants a chance to enjoy themselves(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Andy and Julian Banner-Price host the competition at their expensive B&B Plas Dinas Country House in Snowdonia, giving their new guests the priciest rooms. Peter and Sharron Sorsky are still reeling from their feedback forms and immediately find fault with the accommodation, and the group is taken to wash bedding the old-fashioned way at the local slate museum(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed

The initial impressions are favourable and Peter and Jon begin to bond for the first time during a mosaic class, but not everyone feels up to the planned activity of a cycling tour(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time at Annette McAnespie's farm in Crayke, North Yorkshire, to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers and to air their grievances, before the week's winner is announced(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Stomp, a 13-year-old male okapi, is being encouraged to mate with younger female K'Tusha. But on his first attempt, he snaps his horn and causes K'Tusha a minor injury. Cameras at Chester Zoo also follow African painted dogs as they compete to be pack leader, and Raja the Bornean river turtle meets two prospective mates(n)

programme.title: Love It or List It Australia
programme.desc: Andrew Winter and Neale Whitaker help Mark and Amanda, who live with their three children in a four-bedroom house in Melbourne that needs a solution to its chaotic floorplan(n)

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Presenter Tim Shaw and master mechanic Fuzz Townshend face a race against time to restore a 1980s Porsche 911 from East Anglia that has seen better days - as well as suffering from almost terminal rust, the vehicle is also collapsing in on itself(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree continue their renovation of a French chateau, 18 months after the end of the first series. So far, only nine rooms have been renovated and many areas of the 12-acre estate have yet to be looked at - but the project is going to have to start paying for itself soon. They make plans to host weddings on the grounds, while looking ahead to keeping livestock and growing their own crops. Dick takes steps to generate solar power during a hot summer, and turns an old oil tank into a pig roaster(n)

programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down

programme.title: It Was Alright In
programme.desc: Matt Lucas narrates another look back at TV shows from past decades, with clips and reactions to programmes from people not around to watch them at the time. This edition revisits the changing social attitudes reflected on the small screen in the 1960s, including humorous shows which took liberties in the name of satire, disability being mocked and bulletproof vests being put to the test on live TV. With contributions by Joan Bakewell, Peter Purves, Valerie Singleton and Melvyn Bragg(n)

programme.desc: Niles and Daphne plan a natural birth, causing the father-to-be to develop sympathy pains. Meanwhile, Frasier hires a professional matchmaker - but ends up going on a string of bad dates. Guest starring Laura Linney(n)

programme.desc: The documentary examining the lives of unemployed people visits Hull, which has one of the highest unemployment rates and lowest average weekly wages in the UK. programme.title: Pointless Celebrities
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman put a selection of TV experts through their paces in the unorthodox general knowledge quiz show, asking them to team up with colleagues and contemporaries to provide the least-likely correct answers to a series of questions posed to members of the public. The House That £100K Built presenter Kieran Long teams up with fellow architecture specialist Piers Taylor, while Homes Under the Hammer host Martin Roberts joins forces with Selling Houses' Amanda Lamb. Fifth Gear duo Vicki Butler-Henderson and Tiff Needell combine their wits, and weather forecasters John Hammond and Laura Tobin also compete(n)

programme.title: Pointless Celebrities
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman present another special edition of the unorthodox general knowledge quiz show, pitting another set of celebrity duos against each other in a contest that sees them trying to guess th least likely correct answers to questions posed to members of the public. Competing this time are BBC Radio presenters Diane Louise Jordan and the Rev Richard Coles, recent Celebrity Big Brother evictee Nancy Dell'Olio and 5 News presenter Matt Barbet. Former competitive swimmers Sharron Davies and Mark Foster team up, while broadcaster and writer Gyles Brandreth joins forces with Scottish comedy star and The News Quiz panellist Susan Calman(n)
